import React from 'react'; import { Container, Row, Col, Card } from 'react-bootstrap'; const testimonials = [ { id: 1, name: "Sarah Johnson", role: "Computer Science Graduate", image: "https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/women/32.jpg", text: "The FIA Portal helped me track my academic progress and connect with industry professionals. It's been an invaluable tool during my studies." }, { id: 2, name: "Michael Chang", role: "Data Science Student", image: "https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/54.jpg", text: "I love how easy it is to access resources and get support from faculty members. The portal streamlined my entire educational experience." }, { id: 3, name: "Amina Khan", role: "Software Engineering Student", image: "https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/women/68.jpg", text: "Being able to schedule appointments with advisors and track my degree progress in one place has been amazing. Highly recommended!" }, ]; const TestimonialsSection = () => { return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Hear From Our Students

Discover how the FIA Portal has transformed the academic journey for students across campus

{/* Testimonials Section */}

Student Testimonials

Our students share their experiences with the FIA Portal

{testimonials.map(testimonial => (
"{testimonial.text}"
{testimonial.name}

{testimonial.role}

 ))}
); }; export default TestimonialsSection;
